pkgmetadata.longdescription:
VictoriaMetrics is a fast, cost-effective, and scalable time-series database. The single-node binary handles ingestion, storage, and querying for deployments where a clustered setup would be overkill.
Compatible with InfluxDB line protocol, Graphite, OpenTSDB, Prometheus remote_write, and OpenTelemetry — useful as a central sink for sensor data, application metrics, or any other write-heavy time-series workload.
Built from source using the Gentoo Go toolchain. Includes the victoria-metrics single-node binary plus the vmagent / vmctl / vmbackup / vmrestore companion tools for ingestion proxying, backfill migrations, and snapshot management.
